scripts.dev:backend: bash -lc 'cd apps/backend && PYTHON_BIN="python3" && if [ -x .venv/bin/python ]; then PYTHON_BIN="$(pwd)/.venv/bin/python"; fi && if [ -f .env ]; then set -a && . ./.env && set +a; fi && "$PYTHON_BIN" -m uvicorn app.main:app --reload'
scripts.test:backend: bash -lc 'cd apps/backend && PYTHON_BIN="python3" && if [ -x .venv/bin/python ]; then PYTHON_BIN="$(pwd)/.venv/bin/python"; fi && "$PYTHON_BIN" -m pytest'
scripts.docker:up: bash -lc 'if docker compose version >/dev/null 2>&1; then docker compose up --build; else docker-compose down --remove-orphans && docker-compose up --build; fi'
scripts.docker:up:frontend: bash -lc 'if docker compose version >/dev/null 2>&1; then docker compose up --build frontend; else docker-compose down --remove-orphans && docker-compose up --build frontend; fi'
scripts.docker:up:backend: bash -lc 'if docker compose version >/dev/null 2>&1; then docker compose up --build backend; else docker-compose down --remove-orphans && docker-compose up --build backend; fi'
scripts.docker:up:gpu: bash -lc 'if docker compose version >/dev/null 2>&1; then docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.gpu.yml up --build; else docker-compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.gpu.yml down --remove-orphans && docker-compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.gpu.yml up --build; fi'
scripts.docker:down: bash -lc 'if docker compose version >/dev/null 2>&1; then docker compose down --remove-orphans; else docker-compose down --remove-orphans; fi'
